base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of simon_jump_duck — a character from 1986 castlevania. Compacted pose — knees drawn up, body crouched. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Compacted pose — knees drawn up, body crouched; used for both jumping-arc mid-air and crouch-ducking. Same sprite reused
